name: JNR Cruiser
description: The JNR Cruiser delivers a premium 12,000 puff disposable vape experience with a wide range of bold, refreshing flavours. Designed for convenience and long-lasting satisfaction.

flavours.name: Tobacco
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Tobacco delivers the robust and earthy taste of premium sun-cured leaves, with a perfect balance of smoky richness and woody undertones. The smooth finish makes this blend ideal for those who enjoy a bold, authentic vaping experience with a refined touch.

flavours.name: Cool Mint
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Cool Mint delivers a clean, sharp, and highly invigorating menthol flavour with a hint of peppermint sweetness. This crisp and refreshing blend is ideal for those who prefer a straightforward, palate-cleansing cooling experience.

flavours.name: Cool Fanta
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Cool Fanta delivers the tangy, effervescent flavour of fizzy orange soft drink, balanced with a subtle, invigorating cooling sensation. This zesty and refreshing blend is ideal for those who enjoy a bubbly, citrus-inspired vape.

flavours.name: Blueberry Raspberry Ice
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Blueberry Raspberry Ice is a perfect blend of tangy blueberry and raspberry sweetness with an icy menthol finish.

flavours.name: Peach Ice
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Peach Ice delivers a bold and juicy burst of ripe, syrupy peach flavour, perfectly balanced with a strong, icy-cool finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a vibrant, frosted fruit hit.

flavours.name: Blueberry Blast
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Blueberry Blast delivers a concentrated, slightly earthy burst of sweet, freshly picked blueberry flavour without any added cooling. This pure and satisfying blend is ideal for those who want an authentic and straightforward berry vape.

flavours.name: Mixed Berry
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Mixed Berry delivers a vibrant, multi-layered blend of sweet strawberries, raspberries, and blueberries for a fruit punch sensation. This smooth and refreshing medley is ideal for those who want a simple, complex, and true-to-life berry vape.

flavours.name: Kiwi Pineapple
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Kiwi Pineapple delivers a tropical fusion of sweet, tangy kiwi and zesty pineapple, perfectly balanced with a smooth, refreshing finish. This bold and vibrant blend is ideal for those who enjoy a fruity and exotic vaping experience that transports you to a tropical paradise.

flavours.name: Passion Fruit Mango Lime
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Passion fruit Mango Lime offers a tantalising trio of sweet mango, tangy passion fruit, and zesty lime, expertly blended to create a vibrant, tropical flavour profile. This smooth and satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy bold, fruity flavours with a refreshing twist.

flavours.name: Quadruple Berry
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Quadruple Berry blends four bold berries—strawberry, blueberry, raspberry, and blackberry—into one intensely fruity and tangy hit with a smooth, juicy finish.

flavours.name: Blackberry Ice
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Blackberry Ice delivers a deep and luscious burst of wild blackberry flavour, perfectly balanced with a brisk, icy-cool finish. This smooth and bold blend is ideal for those who enjoy a pure, slightly tart berry flavour with a satisfying chill.

flavours.name: Strawberry Coconut Watermelon
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Strawberry Coconut Watermelon delivers a tropical trifecta of sweet strawberry, creamy coconut water, and juicy fresh watermelon notes. This complex and smooth blend is ideal for those who crave a sophisticated, sun-drenched cocktail flavour.

flavours.name: Watermelon Ice
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Watermelon Ice delivers the crisp, light sweetness of fresh-cut watermelon, topped off with a strong, highly refreshing icy blast. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who want a perfectly chilled, thirst-quenching vape experience.

flavours.name: Banana Buzz
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Banana Buzz delivers the creamy sweetness of ripe bananas, expertly blended to create a smooth, rich flavour. This satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy a comforting and fruity vaping experience with a natural sweetness.

flavours.name: Grape Ice
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Grape Ice delivers an intense, sweet purple grape flavour, instantly followed by a massive menthol hit for a super frosty finish. This potent and satisfying blend is ideal for those who love a classic lolly taste with extreme cooling.

flavours.name: Mango Magic
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Mango Magic delivers the rich, sweet flavour of ripe mangoes, perfectly balanced with a smooth, tropical finish. This satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a bold and fruity vaping experience with the exotic taste of fresh mango.

flavours.name: Skittles
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Skittles bursts with a rainbow of fruity flavours, delivering a sweet and tangy vape that’s as vibrant and playful as the classic candy.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Strawberry
flavours.description: The JNR Cruiser Chup@ Chups Strawberry delivers a nostalgic and intensely sweet, concentrated artificial strawberry candy flavour. This bold and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a true-to-life, sugary lolly vape experience.
